h5bc776d1ga946g4d35ga446ge8a6fd449ce0: You took it upon yourself to undertake the Rite of Thorns? To spill blood in this sacred place?
h54e6da66g5272g4daeg8acdg7a1ba754400d: It would have been easier if you just died, Kagha. Now I have to hear your excuses instead.
h684f5f3fg1662g4961g90eag89faacbe4da3: An error most grave, Master. I beg your grace.
h94975044g3960g4362gb48dg3610387fa47b: Grace is bestowed by nature, not me.
h490c3b23gaee7g4425g89e9g75a9addaad6f: You will stay, as a novice anew. You have forgotten the ways of the druids, the natural order of things.
h0c8e41d8gca3bg4cedg83feg211b946aabaf: It is up to you to prove the lessons have been learned once more.
h70ccac42g7092g4cdcg90e1g7acb7335e20c: So as you say, and so it is done, Master.
h2284462eg6220g431ag925fg943e0bb778d9: Are you mad? Kagha's a traitor.
h54ad3012g0c99g45dbgaef1g64a707dc1030: A dreadful misdeed - one she will never live down. But the grove still needs her passion.
hf0bae708gd7a3g4920g8a78g114ae52bd36d: I was going to show leniency, but Kagha... a child is dead because of you.
h2d6b26d8gaea3g4d42g8f47gcc10919c7f65: It was an accident! She stole the idol - we were overzealous, yes, but -
hed15e0f3g056cg452eg9cebg0f5a1b4ffdc7: - there is no we. You were the driving force behind this madness. Now it stops.
h7596412ag51b4g4ff1gb6f6gf6a0a8d3cddf: As for the idol? It's nothing compared to a life. A mere object, next to one of nature's creations.
hfc782517gba13g486bga9d1g10c3f55a64b4: I cannot absolve you, even if you are repentant.
h17fc6a05ga9a0g4bc9g917cg7c588f6cc7ed: The girl's parents should have decided your fate, but they perished. Instead, nature will judge you.
h7ba610ddgdef2g419dg9a52gea4c7404bb2e: You are banished from this place - banished from everywhere the Oak Father's creations thrive.
h5c0fb483g2e1eg4292g8512g10c8dcea83d2: You are an enemy of nature, to be shunned until you redeem yourself, or die. Now go.
h1247880eg0248g409bg91c3g216f4d411512: Apologies for that ugliness. A more bitter homecoming than I would have wished, but at least the grove stands, thanks to you.
h1b70a960gf99eg4d57gb2b3g46e231dfd126: Kagha had that coming to her. Well done.
h6ea0ce0bg3d0dg4b85ga806g06174abdc5f4: Well done? No... this shouldn't have been necessary in the first place. I failed.
h1e1487d6g1f4eg463ag8d38g47b85f947704: Consider it in the past now. We must look forward.
h09753e6cg5bebg4223g839cg633bbb884c21: The grove stands. Nature prevails. I owe you my thanks - and an introduction.
h4c35a0fagf3d3g4b98g9634g60ffb900fd6b: I am Halsin - First Druid of the Emerald grove... and I sense you have a problem you seek my help with.
h5e5c98ddga8d0g4bf0ga29dge48814a63586: Yes. I have a mind flayer parasite inside my head. I want your help removing it.
h4fa89854g71c5g46eeg916bg8642d124ebac: ... that problem. You're infected with the mind flayer spawn, aren't you? Oak Father preserve you, child.
h6905f11fgb743g4634g82d4g442e92f67bca: But... something's different. You're aware of the monster inside you. You don't bow to the Absolute, like the True Souls do...
h1951aa72gaa2bg414cg921fgc8dba8e7c326: It's no coincidence that we found each other, I'll wager? You're after a cure for this parasite.
h24a6e2e6g0b8cg4f0fg844fg4603f78172d5: There's a chokehold of magic, binding the creature to you. Any efforts to remove it would almost certainly kill you - or worse.
h12a5c62eg3b9ag4e85gb7e7gb18d3e5d157d: 'Almost'? That means I still have a chance. One I intend to take.
hfec4b90fgd3bag4ea3gba20g771c16a4f54e: Your resolve is most admirable. It'll serve you well for where you've to go - Moonrise Towers.
he8f2cbddg1621g46bfg89dfgeaaac52a8fae: That place is where the cultists send their captives. Innocents go in, True Souls come out. It has to be the source of this magic.
hbd360c09ga004g46cdgb817g6122a5840baf: And you think I'll find a cure if I find this source at Moonrise?
h445ce7e6g0a0eg4d4egb816gd3e7b18805ac: Precisely. If we can understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
hc424165fgb823g49e1gb133g62d163ec868b: It's immensely powerful, whatever it is - strong enough to slow ceremorphosis to a crawl. Luckily that gives you more time.
h93122e8eg68d8g4b75g8a37g80fdbcd90fa8: I will do what I can to help you. Let us speak tomorrow - you and I both have matters to see to first.
h36a1d508g8e0dg4efegabd4g24ba0f4f5f8e: As for what you've done for the grove, speak to Rath. He will see to your reward.
heb178355g6c15g4875ga622gbf61aa969838: That must be where the ship was taking me - before it crashed.
h2cbbce16g2641g4b98gb1fbg7f5b1ab0437f: Be glad it did, or you'd be a True Soul by now.
hdb8ba4dfge66ag48bdgbc50g75209481964d: If we can get to Moonrise and  understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
h90638c45gb2e9g4178gb8bdgd44bf752273e: I wasn't taken to Moonrise - I was infected on a mind flayer ship, before it crashed.
he5f87436gcea1g4d72g800dgfdfcc83766e9: And where do you suppose that ship was taking you? Moonrise, I'll wager. The journey differs, but the problem is the same.
h64ee2e3dg664bg4b8eg81deg25e9f160a8da: That doesn't sound much like hope to me. Can't you help?
ha5f3572dgbc93g4482ga0f9g79ee352692f0: Patience. I can't just snap my fingers... but I know where the solution almost certainly lies -  Moonrise Towers.
h46d88921ga6cag48afg808dg8f945da2f330: This magic isn't typical of ceremorphosis?
h8e35d41cgac5cg4fc3g9103gbfe9544e89df: No, this is different. Altered. But I believe I know where answers can be found - Moonrise Towers.
h9406a740gc5cbg43f7g9d30g189b8c26e7af: You learned all this by studying the True Souls?
hd5af1c3bg28ccg44b0g8affg315b80cda745: Indeed. After we dealt with the drow that ambushed us, Nettie and I were able to inspect the corpse - and the creature that slithered out of it.
ha0428a14g5024g46feg88c7g973754a697b0: I had no idea anyone beyond their ranks was infected. You have my sincere sympathies.
h7277ef72g37a1g4f91gab59gb2da65f8faf7: This magic you mentioned - it isn't normal for these parasites?
hb489d9d3gddb1g432fg9451g0b06978faeff: How do you know all this?
hba55c96dg2c69g4418g84d7gb2c42832ab12: A drow forced me to defend myself. Afterwards, I was able to study the parasite that slithered out of the corpse, see what drives these 'True Souls'.
hda7b20a9g3b51g4508ga569gf7739f35e051: I escaped from an illithid ship after being infected. Maybe the process was interrupted.
h64c9948aga5e9g4404g9d67g642455d7fbf4: Perhaps... but I wouldn't want to place all my faith in blind luck.
hd24448b0g7d45g4bfagb274g0d0fc912378a: A being called Orpheus is protecting me; shielding me from the worst of the parasite's magic.
hfa79f7b9g21d8g485bg87a4g6021c6239388: That sounds... novel. But all right, who is this Orpheus? I'd like to bend the ear of anyone who knows about these things.
hff07afa7gb02dg49f9g9f9dg01d63cf5f5d1: It's... complicated. But he's proven helpful. Trust me.
he85958d2gb697g41aegb8ebg41bac474a879: The grove would likely be a pyre if you hadn't come along. I think I can trust you.
h346dd3aegc035g4e85gb5dag0b90c6c9758a: This 'Orpheus' character might be offering you protection, but it sounds like you still need to find a cure - that's something I can help with.
h23a1a868gb7bfg4ebfg8300gc171ff9077b9: But I'm afraid it won't be easy, or quick.
h045206f2g580bg44b6g80f4g8037b9dfe134: I don't know the truth about him. I'm not sure he even has an ear to bend.
ha41b49a5g2cc4g4f07ga564gd93a1184cf50: Hmm. There's only so much stock you can place in mysterious friends with unknown agendas.
hde376e8bga517g4a1eg8833ga5ccfd4d1a93: ... it's true. I can feel it right now. Oak Father preserve you, child.
he82939d8ga978g4604gaa16g7efaeba92205: I don't know what you mean. What problem?
h1aed3522g9a0eg4c0ag9c86g3c7d22e2776d: Wait - how did you get here?
hb2cbb960g0c4fg459cg892eg6a2e11d743e6: I was an unwilling guest of the goblins - but your efforts left them in disarray and I was able to escape.
h1f0be947ga3a0g4051gaef5g3093492033df: The grove stands. Nature prevails. And again, I am in your debt.
h919a1d3eg9efeg4b86gb014gd7b1521055ae: Speak to Rath - he will reward you for your efforts.
h5bf40cebge6f7g4d22g9de7g39a11e7496b3: What about my problem? I need to get to Moonrise Towers.
h18fbc28bge20bg43eag827bgc08afc14fb57: Soon. Remember the dangers I told you about - there'll be plenty of time to face them.
h1bc08b51gfd9cg41a7gb844g393d1280ff11: Take tonight to rest, recuperate - celebrate. Tomorrow, we can strike out.
h5d0efdb3g8a1fg4162g8da4g47517ba30d5e: Take tonight to rest, recuperate -celebrate. Tomorrow, I'll join your camp so I can help with the trials yet to come.
h9d3dd3feg5659g4d0dgb7c0gb8d9abd92458: Soon. First I must set matters to rights in the grove. And you should celebrate your victory.
h2c55c12cg49c3g4a57g87c2g0ba4c3300a1c: After being dormant for so long, your infection is unlikely to produce new symptoms spontaneously.
h682d1efdg09e9g48ccgb171gcedcebac55e6: Tomorrow morning, we shall discuss what is to come.
h2668725cg4598g47b7g99d5g58552f8096f7: No more delays. Tell me what you know about getting to Moonrise.
h6686c746g03d9g45f6gb254ged89c76d3182: If you insist, though hastening me won't make things any easier, I'm afraid.
h65af99f0g211ag4a63g9933g37f5b03c11b0: Travelling to Moonrise is no small task; expect dangers like you've never seen before.
h114888c5g1a90g466eg8d42geb6119dcecd2: Don't be so sure. I'm something of an expert when it comes to imperilling myself.
ha8f13ffeg20dfg4cc9ga824gb93561f70010: Not like this. There's more fingers on a hand than there are survivors of that place.
hcb9bf822gb947g44e7g8f2egc71d804f9cb0: To get to the towers, you'll need to pass through a terrible place - a cursed place.
hab363eadg9f4bg4b3fg9b04gc20114a3dc81: This curse shrouds everything in shadow - you will not find life, light or anything natural there.
h104505d4g73e8g4fa6ga7dfg08872258ceb7: Any who linger are twisted by the curse; they become shadow beings - tormented, dangerous souls.
h3c8ca267g6766g429cgbe85g6bb13c983d33: Sounds like I've no choice - I need to find a way through.
ha265cae2g537fg4e33gb470g5d76b56e5c4e: You're half-right - you have to get to Moonrise, but you still have a choice of how to get there.
h7f35036bg7558g4999ga015gf4d6e5f9cbc9: You could go overland - along the Risen Road or through the mountains. Easier at first, but you'll run into the shadow curse eventually.
h184c920dgdcc1g4711g9843g1e5dfd7fcca9: You could also go under. There is a tunnel somewhere in the ruined temple of Selûne. It leads to Moonrise Towers through the Underdark.
hd22855d2g2233g4e9dg81bcgda675580c8d9: Long ago, a man called Ketheric Thorm built a secret stronghold deep down there, before rallying a whole army of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers.
h199fce26gf90fg476agb550g0414421e10d6: Dark Justiciars? I must see for myself.
hfc62ee9cgcf0dg4dcfg8f8bg76ad6256d23c: Aradin and his lot were looking for a way down there - they were promised riches if they retrieved a relic called the Nightsong. But I think there's more.
h2d0113e6g48fcg48f0g85c2g9ec2a64e9123: From this stronghold, Ketheric's forces could access both the temple of Selûne and Moonrise Towers - but he was defeated before he could launch an attack.
h27a88e0fg5e64g4a86gb6a4gee34f0edf0bb: If you can find this place, I'll wager it will reveal a path to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
h633ebb94g1c41g469bga13fg556f7472211c: I found the hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne - the way is clear.
h3a7bcd15gfb6ag416fgbe02g6543c774c418: Already...? If only I'd gone with you instead of Aradin.
h15fbbe42gaf29g45efg95e3g4f705f853dc9: I've already found a way into the Underdark. I can pick up the trail from there.
hda8d616eg2c7ag4443gbb9fga2c706be1f61: So how do I find this underground route?
h399dacdag1941g4c14gba3fg15b86af1169b: You'll need to pick up where Aradin left off - find the hidden entrance. It's somewhere in the Selûne temple ruins, from what I've heard.
hc7f52409g36a9g49d8g9283g92e44f0dc19f: One of the adventurers had a clue to help find it - a dwarf called Brian. It might still be found on his corpse, wherever the goblins left it.
hd16f71e2gdf94g4be3g85f0g030b34cc25d6: I don't want to risk getting lost in the Underdark - I'll journey overland.
h9c58a3dbgbdd1g4ce0gaf75g3588b337a3d3: You may reconsider once you see the effects of the curse for yourself.
h8f8c657fg1cdag411agacdbgfc009646f6a7: But there'll be danger either way, and I'll be at your side in camp, no matter what.
h60a63b25gc965g497eg959fga9b4e0277434: I've long sought to return to Moonrise Towers - unfinished business. It seems our fates have aligned.
h35846719g357ag4357g9a98g5247b06ad3b6: How do I find this passage through the Underdark?
h72945389g8bbeg4d8ag80e3g9e42b055eee2: Say I decide to try this Underdark route after all - how do I get started?
h9d006830g2396g4487gbce8g9077aec9ba1e: There's no time to waste, then.
h438e6586g2bb7g4b45g847dg32c5b080e7a3: There's a little time to waste, I think. After what you've done for the grove, a little unwinding is the very least you deserve.
he23cec9bg3491g4d3cgb358g52554117b505: Come morning, I'll have settled my affairs here, and will be free to join your camp and help with what's to come.
h79e43802gc27fg4cd6gab83g041fc1cfb0e8: I advise you start in the temple of Selûne - if you find the Dark Justiciars' hidden entrance, it could lead you all the way to Moonrise.
ha9ef5e79g66f3g41e9ga28cgb22d953347f0: You want to come to Moonrise as well? Why?
h06af4990g0c58g40ebgadf1g969880210912: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
hd413a129gad5dg4702g9f92g01a9808dd0da: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
h1146199eg665fg4552ga568g6767cc8c3a7f: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
he82a54e7gdbe4g4c2eg85c9geebb6715fa84: I spent years researching the curse, trying to put an end to it. Nothing has worked - yet.
h24d46329gcdd8g4a40g8881g05f5d15bba76: If I can join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I can lift this curse, same as you may find a cure for your infection.
h0b1a788dgf4d9g4636g9a34g9cda9b5f9ed8: Is that why you went with Aradin? You thought he might uncover this route to Moonrise?
hfeebaa90g8aaeg4a90gb45eg8956ab706749: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
hed767d85gc8cfg45f8gb028g6950cf7d5af3: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
hf14f231ag1d1fg4c83g9516gd080fe1cdd85: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
h5f91a95dg32bag4f5egabb4ga519f504f398: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
h2d45dcabgdfa8g4563gb7cdg1c23aac59a93: What about the grove? You only just got back.
hedcca750g5540g4349ga490gea24a7825a4f: Don't worry. I'll see to whatever needs my attention here. It will be safe in my absence now.
hb5e56f68g4925g4259g981egca7bacfc09ce: Once I've settled matters in the grove, I would like to join your camp, if you'll allow me. I can offer my skills, my counsel.
h57794503g7bd5g433bga8b4g34c84d075294: I never thought I'd say this, but it sounds like the Underdark is the safer route.
h280516d8gc004g4e60g92a6g39867bda49e8: Anything is preferable to risking the shadow curse.
h77dadce1g3ecbg4328gb922gefee7c7ccc71: The decision is yours, but I'd favour the Underdark. Even a place like that is the lesser evil compared to the shadow-cursed lands.
he3c946aag27c9g4677gad31g28ee59a64ae1: This shadow curse - does it affect Shar worshippers?
h53027de2g8f96g4429gab3eg8c29233254b2: I don't know. Ketheric's followers were defeated or vanished before the effects of the curse took hold.
hfb28d48bgd8a4g4717g8731ga1942d2623e5: Are these Sharrans still to be found?
h792e99dag658cg4b05ga795g42aa392f253a: As bones, perhaps. But their hidden structures might still remain.
hb636a7d4g9490g4fd9g9e12ga1fcac484f6d: I know the Underdark - it's lethal. I'll travel overland.
h49dbb5c1g68edg4c4fg9ca2gd4b8673709f1: The Underdark's my home. Better to take that route than risk this curse.
h6eabed8cgf529g4134gb110gd4b36a649e9e: The Absolute's forces can tolerate such a place?
h4335a1d1g2b3fg49fegb193ga19542637fe1: So it seems, though I don't know how. You will have to choose your approach carefully.
h06f76c86g1ac1g4d2dg9df0g0fac5d7dc525: There must be another way to cure myself - my kin have dealt with these parasites before.
h64de5c08g3cb2g4473gb57dg160816e068dc: There must be another way to cure myself.
hfb1f9d5bg2d30g442bg95dcgc91ab7d70f74: By all means - pursue any leads you may have. But I sense all roads will lead to Moonrise.
h7f36458cg0a1cg4fc1g884bgf04d415c50b4: How are you so sure Moonrise is where I have to go?
hd696bd08g6d01g45d0g8eaeg3fce8805fb64: Nature speaks to me. Birds report what they've seen. And I've overheard goblins speaking of it too. Moonrise is at the heart of all this, I'm sure of it.
h29ea2eb7gd9a8g4092g8f23g14492b2f1feb: And what does that make you? The thumb?
hfd071205g6f5dg4b38g8d64g5f82982d85ed: Very funny. You'll need a sense of humour for what you've to face next.
h9107ae54gbd8cg436bg8be5gb60654921486: Damn. It's never easy, is it?
ha168a67agefc9g402eg9e0eg22ba0955c694: Little of value ever comes easy. And I take it you value your life.
h925235afg1d86g446fga3d5g9269271eb7d7: The grove is nature's beating heart - I was glad to help save it.
ha78e3b1fga07cg4c33g8e73g65886eb9d3ca: I acted to save my kin, not this place.
h19bba152g49d0g4e81g9209g1d13aec13fec: I hope this grove of yours is worth the bloodshed.
hd6a572dbg203dg47e7ga7e9g521e058e3022: If only you had come to this place in more peaceful times. You'd have been a welcome addition.
h2ebab5e9g783ag4202gaa70g39cdd2015c62: And yet save it you did. I am grateful no matter what your motivations.
h76dc6937g6b01g4ac3g9567g99fbdf35fe58: Believe me, it is. The span of a mortal life isn't enough to grasp the importance of this place. Its roots touch everything.
h7f04f07ag7cfdg477dg97b3gb13d2d1c53b0: The grove is nature's beating heart - I was glad to help save it.
hc66643f2g1c39g4aa5ga790g4ad2edfdf3c3: I acted to save my kin, not this place.
h7f923375gda43g4c29g965ag642b7e4417bb: I did as I wished to. I never cared if this place was saved or not.
he0749acdgf4e2g429cga1f7geceedac9be93: This place means nothing to me, but a great deal to you, it seems. I hope the blood price was worth it.
h3f17ec81g8f70g4770g9c76gbd3e7f1e2aeb: I hope this grove of yours was worth the bloodshed.
h731b15c8gb1a7g4c21ga552g0d97c699d039: There's something else I wanted to ask, about getting to Moonrise Towers.
h26f8bbb5g0054g436bgb228g14047f1184d3: Please, ask. Though I can't guarantee you'll like the answers about that place.
h970425d5gb5afg4370gbc81g7a217f025bf4: When you helped Aradin's group before - that was because you thought they might discover a route to Moonrise?
hbfa88637g0c1fg46f5g923dgcfd7c569e2b4: The journey to Moonrise Towers, and all the dangers that that entails.
hfefddd7cg8fa1g4dccgb473g430878fc95ef: But that's tomorrow's problem. Take some time for yourself tonight - rest, celebrate. Come morning, I'll be by your side.
hcd87be6dg0727g4cd2gb2b4g7b8d60c9bd7a: Rest. Heal. Celebrate if you wish. Mourn if you must. Come morning, we shall discuss delivering you from your parasite.
h718587c0gf478g4104g92a4g5774565f13c9: I watched that child die because of her. She deserved far worse than that.
h2068b18bg3680g49e8gad49g5a1591596569: Her punishment is only just beginning, trust me.

h66ae5dfcg366cg4c74g87aag70149d5ace98: You overreacted. The child's death was an accident.
h262b216fga5f6g401bg8f84g73d792b2699b: Please. Don't sully the gratitude I feel towards you by making excuses for Kagha. My choice was clear.
h75a8e6e7g065ag4f98g85cbg76c93f751567: Neither of us saw what happened before - maybe the child's death wasn't her fault.
h7bbe3abeg4f37g4117gb4a7g79b069490719: You are an enemy of nature, to be shunned until you redeem yourself, or die. Now go.
h8b17d67bg0487g4bc1gb33agd28da65b89c0: Nature will determine your fate - whatever happens to you next, know that it is the Oak Father's will.
h925635a4g9219g4ef2gbab0g48ab6b081be4: Now get out of my sight. There is nothing more to be said.
h9943b098gb65bg4575g8398g5a7ac3c43322: Now get out of my sight. There is nothing more to be said.
hf6a720adg6c50g4484gbe6fg1e4b2cb12cd9: I owe you nothing. Goblins swarmed us like roaches while you stumbled after the past.
h1b353583g2df4g4eefga61dgccaeb23588ff: You chose to abandon us. I chose to protect us!
h9dd22d36g8ff8g4dbdga5b0g871d4e994bbe: I will allow you to stay. But consider yourself a novice anew. You have forgotten the ways of the druids - our place in the natural order.
h3dbd41fcg419fg43dcg94e4g3fd0c51efd74: You shall learn it all once again, right here. Backslide, and nature's fury will crush you.
hfabea8e5gec05g472cgab6bge91d12d8e427: That's all? She tried to imprison a child.
h5fd92bcdgfc00g4e4ag8e1fgcc685bcf6a41: A misjudgement - one that should weigh heavily upon her. But the grove still needs her passion.
h1e3f54e4gb5a2g44d1ga223g4ce48f4534df: You will soon see why. But enough of that for now - I owe you my thanks.
hf23e0a6eg6456g4f6egaefcgb1a4a7cb7826: You'll have your hands full with her. She shows great spirit, to put it mildly.
h4807379bg8ff8g4a06g9a2cg631cf9923547: She shows great insolence. But time will humble her - and the grove still needs her.
hce26d27ag5511g4b30g846cg999b610da323: No need to be so harsh. Kagha acted out of concern.
h596916d5g4bb9g4b83g85bcgdb10b88e15b8: Misplaced, self-important concern. She must learn to respect the balance of all things. But the grove still needs her.
hd2477a91g848fg4c77g879cg65292d2a46e4: Such mercy is a show of weakness. You're tainting a hard-won victory.
h2a5dc39ag1e48g4d68g801ag7a6b8b7a6518: No doubt you'd have me flay her or cast her into a spiked pit. But the grove needs druids.
h59e9828fg71cag419fg9cddg31325faafa72: You were too lenient. There's bad blood between tieflings and druids because of her.
hab5a3679g67cbg4372g85bcgc5096f4a05a5: Spilled blood will not right bad blood. Allow me to deal with my own - I still have need of her.
hffe3ad15gbe06g484cgb6ddg149006241a5b: You should turn her over to my kin for judgement. Bad blood still lingers.
hec39f880gce99g49c2g9506ge1ada4b9f323: Is such mercy wise? She's strayed from your teachings once already.
hb1ea6cccgf71fg44abgb9ffg045a89690c16: She knows now what cavorting in the shadows brings her. She will not stray again. Besides, this is no time to lose a promising druid.
hd114ac6bg4c36g440bg880fgd4a815daa935: A thief is dead - she stole the idol, befouled the grove!
hfb895d11gb533g47c6gb845gba5a36de345f: Enough. If anyone befouled this place, it is you - by sowing division, hatred - death.
h25dececcg8867g40b6gbe09gf382bc5af192: You show no pity, no remorse. I cannot absolve you.
h3519c1dfg6410g415aga9d6g40ad8583b979: You took it upon yourself to undertake the Rite of Thorns? I ought to exile you from this place. Forever.
hba91dbdfgf177g448eg89f3g3b63b4ef08a6: Instead I shall listen to the explanation that you owe me.
